title: galium serpenticum subsp. serpenticum
intro: Galium serpenticum subsp. serpenticum, also known as Serpent's Gale of Snow or Snowy Galium, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, Galium serpenticum subsp. serpenticum is prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
